name: Samos Energy Acquisition Corp
business: Samos Energy Acquisition Corp is a blank check company formed to effect a merger or acquisition with one or more businesses, focusing on the traditional energy sector, particularly upstream and midstream oil & gas, and thermal power. It has not identified any specific target or initiated substantive discussions as of the filing date.

exposures.sentence: Our acquisition and value creation strategy will be to identify, acquire and, after our initial business combination, build a company in the energy industry, primarily targeting the upstream and midstream oil & gas sector, and the thermal power sector, which we believe is comprised of hundreds of companies with free cash flow generative assets.
